name: CaneyCloud
one_liner: Hotel operating system for Venezuela — posadas, boutique hotels, and hostels sell, operate, and collect payments from one place.
overview: CaneyCloud is a hotel operating system built for Venezuelan hospitality — posadas, boutique hotels, hostels, and cabins. It brings reservations, WhatsApp sales, payments, and invoicing into a single platform, replacing the scattered spreadsheets, chat groups, and disconnected payment systems small operators run on today.

name: VamosaVenezuela
one_liner: A travel platform for the Venezuela you haven't seen — curated stays, dining, and experiences across every region of the country.
overview: VamosaVenezuela is a travel guide and trip-planning platform for Venezuelan tourism. It curates places to stay, dining, and activities across the country's regions — from Los Roques to Mérida to Canaima — with destination guides, sample itineraries, and planning tools.

name: PIPA Database
one_liner: An early-stage data platform, currently incubating — "PIPA Database" is a working title.
overview: PIPA Database is an early-stage internal build, still in incubation. The name is a working title, and the public write-up will land here once the project is further along.
